race.comment: BOUNCING BEYOND (9) is a lightly raced type with a strong record under Holder. Last start winner over this circuit and should be at top now after two runs back. Expected to go close again. TOSEN WATER (5) comes through a strong race behind Dobbinair last time and did the best of the fellow rivals here when runner-up. Races close to the speed and going well. Looks a leading chance again. BIG BRUTE (8) was a provincial winner two back then led and gave a sight in open class last time. Has the inside and will take catching this line-up. GINGER SINNER (4) ran a much-improved race second-up and looks ready to fire. Goes well over this course and distance and will be tough to stop. JILLADORA (2) is racing well and will be tough to stop late.
